This website uses cookies
We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services. You consent to our cookies if you continue to use our website.

About
  
  
The law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. For all other types of cookies we need your permission.  
  
This site uses different types of cookies. Some cookies are placed by third party services that appear on our pages.  
  
You can at any time change or withdraw your consent from the Cookie Declaration on our website.  
  
Learn more about who we are, how you can contact us and how we process personal data in our Privacy Policy.
**Do not sell or share my personal information**

# Top 8 Fitness Influencers Inspiring Healthier Lifestyles in 2026
![](https://disruptmarketing.co/wp-content/themes/disrupt/images/blogs/clock-icon-yellow.svg)
7 MIN READ
![](https://disruptmarketing.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/marta-vercesi.png)
[ BY Marta Vercesi  ](https://disruptmarketing.co/blog/author/marta-vercesi/)
LAST UPDATED ON: 27 January 2026
[ Influencer  ](https://disruptmarketing.co/blog/category/influencer/) [ Opinion  ](https://disruptmarketing.co/blog/category/opinion/) [ Social  ](https://disruptmarketing.co/blog/category/social/)
Discover the top 8 UK fitness influencers for 2026 trusted as the go-to guides for health and wellness inspiration, curated by Disrupt's Marta Vercesi.
In recent years, fitness content has stepped into the spotlight as a core niche on social media. From _Gymtok_ to Park Runs, exercise and healthy living content is everywhere across [TikTok](https://disruptmarketing.co/tiktok/), Instagram and YouTube. Fitness influencers have emerged as the most trusted voices in promoting active lifestyles and personal well-being. More than [40% of millennials](https://vitalityhealthclub.com.au/how-has-social-media-changed-the-fitness-industry/#:~:text=The%20Rise%20of%20Fitness%20Influencers,and%20motivation%20to%20their%20followers.) now follow at least one fitness influencer on social media, with the desire to achieve a healthier lifestyle being their top motivation. In a post-COVID world where health and wellness are more important than ever, people are increasingly turning to these influencers for guidance, motivation, and inspiration.
In the UK, top fitness influencers excel at creating tight-knit communities, where followers feel genuinely connected, supported and encouraged. This close relationship makes the best fitness influencers invaluable for fitness and exercise brands looking to leverage the creator economy, as their recommendations carry real weight and resonate deeply with their audiences.
## What is a fitness influencer?
A fitness influencer is a social media content creator who focuses on fitness, exercise, and healthy living. They share a variety of content, such as workout plans, running tips, strength-training advice, and healthy eating hacks, aiming to inspire and educate their audience.
Fitness influencers often build strong connections with their followers through their passion for health, along with their ability to share relatable, practical insights. By blending expertise with personal experiences, they motivate their audiences to pursue their own fitness goals, whether it's starting a new workout routine or improving overall well-being.
## Marta's Top 8 Fitness Influencers
### **Bronte King ([@brontekingg](https://www.instagram.com/brontekingg/)):**
  
Bronte is a fitness influencer who’s known for sharing her personal wellness journey, real-life struggles, workout routines, and health tips with her dedicated followers. Beyond fitness, she’s the founder of _Gals Who_ , a supportive community for women, where she blends her passion for fitness with her commitment to creating a safe space for female empowerment. Her authenticity, paired with her focus on wellness, has helped her build a loyal audience across various lifestyle niches, from fitness to travel - a perfect creator to kick off our top fitness influencer list.
![](https://disruptmarketing.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Untitled-design-33-1024x1024.jpg)
### **Milly G ([@millyg_fit](https://www.instagram.com/millyg_fit/)):**
  
Milly is a fitness and lifestyle influencer who stands out for her genuine engagement, expertise, and approach to health. Her content revolves around her fitness struggle and journey, practical workout routines, and nutritional advice that her followers connect with on a personal level. Her authenticity and relatable approach make her a go-to influencer for fitness brands looking to build trust with an audience that prioritises wellness and sustainable fitness.
> [@millygoldsmith](https://www.tiktok.com/@millygoldsmith?refer=embed "@millygoldsmith") THE olympics invited ME to run a 10k race at midnight!!?![🇫🇷](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f1eb-1f1f7.svg)![🏃](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f3c3.svg) [#paris](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/paris?refer=embed "paris") [#running](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/running?refer=embed "running") [#runningvlog](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/runningvlog?refer=embed "runningvlog") [♬ original sound - millygoldsmith](https://www.tiktok.com/music/original-sound-7402360170519137056?refer=embed "♬ original sound - millygoldsmith")
### **Stef Williams ([@stef.williams](https://www.instagram.com/stef.williams/)): **
  
Stefis a go-to influencer in the fitness world, thanks to her in-depth knowledge of fitness and her successful fitness clothing brand. She shares a mix of workout routines, strength training advice, and personal fitness goals that inspire and motivate her followers. Stef’s transparency and expertise have earned her a loyal following, making her an excellent partner for brands that want to connect with a dedicated fitness-focused audience and enhance their credibility.
> [@stefanie_williams](https://www.tiktok.com/@stefanie_williams?refer=embed "@stefanie_williams") 60 minute workout with me ![🔥](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f525.svg)![❤️](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/2764.svg) my workout App @WeGLOW App [♬ original sound - Champion™️](https://www.tiktok.com/music/original-sound-6691759268930145030?refer=embed "♬ original sound - Champion™️")
### **James Smith ([@jamessmithpt](https://www.tiktok.com/@jamessmithpt?lang=en)): **
  
James is known for his no-nonsense approach to fitness, debunking myths and challenging industry norms with humour and honesty. His straight-shooting style resonates with those frustrated by the unrealistic fitness standards often seen on social media. For brands that value authenticity and want to reach an audience seeking real, relatable fitness advice, James is a powerful voice in the influencer space and must for our top fitness influencer list.
> [@jamessmithpodcast](https://www.tiktok.com/@jamessmithpodcast?refer=embed "@jamessmithpodcast")
> You owe me a pen.
> [♬ original sound - James Smith](https://www.tiktok.com/music/original-sound-7441324818413980448?refer=embed "♬ original sound - James Smith")
### **Jessica Olie ([@jessicaolie](https://www.instagram.com/jessicaolie/)):**
  
Jessica combines fitness, mental wellness, and mindfulness in a way that makes her incredibly relatable and trusted by her followers. She’s known for her focus on yoga and flexibility, but her content goes deeper, promoting a balanced approach to both physical and mental health. Through her own wellness brand, Jessica advocates for self-empowerment and personal growth, building a strong, loyal community around her holistic approach to fitness.
![](https://disruptmarketing.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/jessicaolie_1725209550_3447630046868187827_366341880-821x1024.jpg)
### **Meggan Kirkland ([@meggangrubb](https://www.instagram.com/meggangrubb/)): **
  
Meggan’s content goes beyond just physical fitness, offering a full glimpse into her lifestyle, including mental wellness, motherhood, and self-care routines. She connects with her audience by being open about the highs and lows of her journey, creating an honest, relatable space for her followers. In addition to her content, Meggan is the founder of _Bluee_ , a sustainable and ethically produced multi-wear activewear and swimwear brand. She is also the creator of the _Beyond App_ , a thriving community with over 100,000 members, designed to provide women with a safe space to share their fitness journeys and connect with others. Her transparency and balanced approach to health and fitness make her a truly inspiring figure in the wellness community.
> [@meggangrubb](https://www.tiktok.com/@meggangrubb?refer=embed "@meggangrubb")
> Determined to show this baby the world in the best way I can, to show her that moving your body can be fun and to dance like nobody’s watching whenever she feels like it. ![🤍](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f90d.svg)
> [♬ original sound - Meggan Grubb](https://www.tiktok.com/music/original-sound-7441270769307175712?refer=embed "♬ original sound - Meggan Grubb")
### **Ellena Hoad ([@ellena_fit](https://www.instagram.com/ellena_fit/)):**
  
Ellena’s content has been a source of inspiration for years, blending fitness and nutrition in a way that makes living a healthy lifestyle accessible and enjoyable. Her easy-to-follow recipes have become essential in many people’s routines, and she continually offers fresh, healthy ideas that fit seamlessly into a balanced lifestyle. Ellena’s approach to food and fitness is both practical and sustainable, making her a trusted voice for anyone looking to improve their overall well-being.
![](https://disruptmarketing.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/ellena_fit_1731259852_3498383658085165374_4514569717-819x1024.jpg)
### **Paul Olima (@[olima_omega](https://www.instagram.com/olima_omega/)):**
**  
**Not only is Paul a fitness influencer with millions of followers across social media, he’s also a former professional rugby player who has even served as a body double for fellow elite athletes like Usain Bolt and Mario Balotelli. Known for his authentic and funny content, Paul engages his audience with his relatable personality and motivational approach to fitness. With a background in high-level sports and advanced fitness training, he combines credibility and expertise with an approachable style that resonates with his followers.
> [@olima_omega](https://www.tiktok.com/@olima_omega?refer=embed "@olima_omega") When a Bodybuilder Tries Pilates ![🧘🏿‍♀️](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f9d8-1f3ff-200d-2640-fe0f.svg) @C4 Energy Europe [#pilates](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/pilates?refer=embed "pilates") [#reformer](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/reformer?refer=embed "reformer") [#bodybuilder](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/bodybuilder?refer=embed "bodybuilder") [#c4energy](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/c4energy?refer=embed "c4energy") [#c4](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/c4?refer=embed "c4") @The Proud Project [♬ original sound - Paul Olima](https://www.tiktok.com/music/original-sound-7400443140043557665?refer=embed "♬ original sound - Paul Olima")
## Who is the most popular fitness influencer?
One of the most popular fitness influencers today is [Chloe Ting](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCCgLoMYIyP0U56dEhEL1wXQ), with over 25 million YouTube subscribers. She gained worldwide recognition through her viral workout challenges, such as the Two-Week Shred Challenge, helping millions achieve their fitness goals from home. Known for her effective, no-equipment workouts and beginner-friendly approach, Chloe has built a strong community across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok. Her engaging content and free fitness programs make her one of the most influential figures in the fitness world today.
![](https://disruptmarketing.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/chloe_t_1737562977_3551258102240071054_2718680-819x1024.webp)
## Fitness Influencer Marketing & the Opportunities for Brands
These top fitness influencers have become trusted guides for health and wellness inspiration, and I’m far from the only one relying on their expertise. Their loyal, highly engaged audiences consistently return for the authentic, relatable content they create.
For brands interested in running fitness influencer marketing campaigns, partnering with creators like these goes beyond boosting visibility. It’s about building genuine connections with new audiences, inspiring healthier lifestyles, and creating the foundation for long-term customer relationships. With the right collaborations, influence turns into measurable results.
  
The potential for impactful partnerships in the fitness space is immense. If you’re ready to elevate your 2026 campaigns, [get in touch](https://disruptmarketing.co/contact-us/) with [Disrupt Influencer Marketing Agency](https://disruptmarketing.co/) today — let’s turn your influencer strategy into real results. For more inspiration, check out our list of the [top UK wellness influencers](https://disruptmarketing.co/blog/the-top-10-wellness-influencers-on-social-media/).  

Why stop there? Whether it’s tech, home, or health, our guides to the top influencers have you covered.

## YOU'VE GOT QUESTIONS.
## WE'VE GOT THE ANSWERS.
**What’s the difference between a gym influencer and a general fitness influencer?![](https://disruptmarketing.co/wp-content/themes/disrupt/images/faq-arrow-down.svg)**
A gym influencer tends to focus specifically on gym-based content: weight training, gym routines, fitness apparel, supplements. A broader fitness influencer might cover outdoor training, wellness, recovery, nutrition or lifestyle elements beyond the gym.
**How can brands leverage fitness influencer marketing effectively?![](https://disruptmarketing.co/wp-content/themes/disrupt/images/faq-arrow-down.svg)**
Answer: Brands should select creators whose audience aligns with their target, allow authentic storytelling, mix short-form (Reels, [TikTok](https://disruptmarketing.co/tiktok/)) and [long-form content](https://disruptmarketing.co/blog/is-long-form-content-making-a-come-back/) (YouTube), track engagement not just reach, and integrate the influencer content into broader campaigns (e.g., product launches, challenges).
**What trends are shaping UK fitness influencers right now?![](https://disruptmarketing.co/wp-content/themes/disrupt/images/faq-arrow-down.svg)**
In the UK fitness space there’s been a shift toward more authentic, community-based creators, micro-influencers with high engagement, content that blends gym training with holistic wellness, and gym influencers who build loyalty rather than just flash routines.
**How can brands ensure an influencer campaign remains relevant in the fast-moving fitness niche?![](https://disruptmarketing.co/wp-content/themes/disrupt/images/faq-arrow-down.svg)**
To keep a fitness influencer campaign relevant, consider these things when deciding on a creator:  
Choose creators who produce timely, trend-aware content.  
Include topics like new workout styles, fitness tech and recovery routines.  
Encourage evergreen content that can be reused across channels.  
Refresh influencer partnerships regularly to keep campaigns fresh.  
Monitor emerging platforms where fitness content grows (e.g., TikTok, YouTube Shorts).
